title: pathseq-t2t pipeline parameters
description: Host-subtraction and microbial profiling pipeline using CHM13v2 T2T reference

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

samplesheet.description: Path to CSV samplesheet with 'sample_id' and 'bam' columns.

outdir.description: Directory where results will be published.

reference_options.title: Reference data options
reference_options.description: Paths to reference files (auto-downloaded on first run if not provided).

reference.description: Path to CHM13v2 T2T FASTA. Auto-downloaded from UCSC if not set.

hostdir.description: Directory containing PathSeq host index files. Auto-downloaded from GATK GCS if not set.

hg38_ref.description: GATK.GRCh38 FASTA for CRAM decoding. Must match the CRAM reference; Broad/GATK Homo_sapiens_assembly38.fasta is auto-downloaded if not set.

decoys_bed.description: BED file of non-human decoy regions to mask.

aligner.description: Aligner to use for host subtraction.

classifiers.description: Comma-separated list of classifiers to run: kraken, metaphlan, sylph.

assembly.description: Enable metagenomic assembly pipeline (MEGAHIT + MetaBAT2 + CheckM2 + GTDB-Tk).

kraken_index.description: Path to Kraken2 database directory. Auto-downloaded (8GB standard DB) if not set.

kraken_db_url.description: URL for Kraken2 database tarball (used when auto-downloading). See https://benlangmead.github.io/aws-indexes/k2

bowtie2_index.description: Directory containing MetaPhlAn Bowtie2 index files.

assembly_options.title: Assembly options
assembly_options.description: Optional paths required for assembly QC and classification.

checkv_db.description: Path to CheckV database (required for binqc with --model checkv or both).

gtdbtk_data.description: Path to GTDB-Tk data directory (GTDBTK_DATA_PATH, required for binclassify).

resource_limits.title: Resource limits
resource_limits.description: Maximum resource caps applied via check_max() in base.config.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs any single process can request.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory any single process can request.

max_time.description: Maximum wall-time any single process can request.

aws_queue.description: AWS Batch job queue ARN or name.

aws_region.description: AWS region for Batch and S3.

s3_work_dir.description: S3 URI for Nextflow work directory, e.g. s3://my-bucket/work.

slurm_queue.description: SLURM partition name, e.g. short, normal, bigmem.

slurm_account.description: SLURM account / project for job accounting.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline.
